ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "sqft_living" INTEGER /* Square footage of living area */,
  "sqft_lot" INTEGER /* Square footage of the lot */,
  "floors" REAL /* Number of floors */,
  "waterfront" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a waterfront (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "view" INTEGER /* View score (0-4, higher is better) */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the property (1-5, higher is better) */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the property (1-13, higher is better) */,
  "sqft_above" INTEGER /* Square footage of the area above ground */,
  "sqft_basement" INTEGER /* Square footage of the basement */,
  "yr_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "yr_renovated" TEXT /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "zipcode" REAL /* Zip code of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, townhouse) */,
  "heating_system" TEXT /* Type of heating system (e.g., central, electric, gas) */,
  "cooling_system" INTEGER /* Type of cooling system (e.g., central air, window unit) */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "hoa_fees" TEXT /* Homeowner association fees (if applicable) */,
  "hoa_name" TEXT /* Name of the homeowner association */,
  "property_status" INTEGER /* Current status of the property (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent listing the property */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the property information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_listing_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES locations ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the property is located */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the property is located */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the area */,
  "school_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the local schools */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the area */,
  "transportation_access" TEXT /* Proximity to public transportation (e.g., bus, subway, train) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device or browser used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., specific fields viewed or modified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
